summary: Member export job times out for orgs with >50k contacts

latest_comment.author: dana.kohl
latest_comment.body: Any update here? Support is getting pinged by two enterprise accounts. Do we have a workaround we can give them before the real fix lands?

intent: Let Dana know I root-caused it to the synchronous CSV build holding the request open. I'm moving the export to the background worker queue, ETA end of week. Offer the interim workaround: they can request a date-bounded export (<=30 days) which stays under the timeout. Move the ticket to In Review once I push the worker change.
